name: Summit Therapeutics Inc.
summary: Summit Therapeutics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of oncology therapies. Its lead product candidate is ivonescimab, a novel bispecific antibody combining PD-1 immunotherapy blockade with anti-VEGF anti-angiogenesis effects into a single molecule. The company in-licensed ivonescimab from Akeso, Inc. in December 2022 and is pursuing clinical development including a BLA accepted for filing related to the HARMONi study.
